---
title: "10_function"
author: "Raymond Otoo"
date: "2026-02-13"
output: pdf_document
---


#=====================================================================================
#
#                                           Part B. Functional Analysis - GO Analysis
#
#=====================================================================================

```{r}
source("project_setup.R")
paths <- init_project(knitr_root = TRUE)
ora_dir <- paths$ora_dir
dir.create(file.path(ora_dir, "plots"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
getwd()
```




```{r}
#------------------------------------------------------------
# Libraries
#------------------------------------------------------------
library(WGCNA)
library(dplyr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(ReactomePA)
library(openxlsx)
library(readr)

#------------------------------------------------------------
# Load WGCNA outputs
#------------------------------------------------------------
load(file.path(paths$wgcna_dir, "WGCNA2_core_outputs.RData"))

stopifnot(colnames(expr) == names(moduleColors))

#------------------------------------------------------------
# Load annotation
#------------------------------------------------------------
analyte_info <- read.delim(
  file.path(paths$data_dir, "CSF_SOMAscan7k_analyte_information.tsv"),
  sep = "\t", header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE
)

background <- read.csv(file.path(paths$data_dir, "background_soma.csv"))
background_soma <- background$EntrezGeneSymbol

```


```{r}
report::report_packages()
```




```{r}
all_features <- colnames(expr)

feature_key <- analyte_info %>%
  dplyr::filter(Analytes %in% all_features) %>%
  dplyr::select(Analytes, EntrezGeneSymbol) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    SOMAmer = Analytes,
    SYMBOL  = EntrezGeneSymbol
  )

map_all <- bitr(
  feature_key$SYMBOL,
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType   = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db
) %>%
  distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE)

feature_map <- feature_key %>%
  inner_join(map_all, by = "SYMBOL")

# Universe background
universe_entrez <- unique(feature_map$ENTREZID)

```

```{r}
modules_to_export <- setdiff(unique(moduleColors), "grey")

get_module_entrez <- function(mod) {

  somamers <- colnames(expr)[moduleColors == mod]

  feature_map %>%
    filter(SOMAmer %in% somamers) %>%
    pull(ENTREZID) %>%
    unique()
}

```

```{r}
run_ORA_GO_BP <- function(entrez) {
  enrichGO(
    gene          = entrez,
    universe      = universe_entrez,
    OrgDb         = org.Hs.eg.db,
    keyType       = "ENTREZID",
    ont           = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.1,
    readable      = TRUE
  )
}

run_ORA_KEGG <- function(entrez) {
  enrichKEGG(
    gene          = entrez,
    universe      = universe_entrez,
    organism      = "hsa",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.1
  )
}

run_ORA_Reactome <- function(entrez) {
  enrichPathway(
    gene          = entrez,
    universe      = universe_entrez,
    organism      = "human",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.1,
    readable      = TRUE
  )
}

```


```{r}
ora_results <- list(
  GO_BP   = list(),
  KEGG    = list(),
  Reactome = list()
)

for (mod in modules_to_export) {

  cat("Running ORA for module:", mod, "\n")

  entrez <- get_module_entrez(mod)

  if (length(entrez) < 10) next

  ora_results$GO_BP[[mod]]    <- run_ORA_GO_BP(entrez)
  ora_results$KEGG[[mod]]     <- run_ORA_KEGG(entrez)
  ora_results$Reactome[[mod]] <- run_ORA_Reactome(entrez)
}

```
```{r}
save_ORA_results <- function(results_object,
                             outdir = ora_dir,
                             padj_cutoff = 0.05) {

  if (!dir.exists(outdir)) {
    dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  }

  for (db in names(results_object)) {

    wb <- createWorkbook()
    cat("Creating workbook for:", db, "\n")

    modules_list <- results_object[[db]]

    for (mod in names(modules_list)) {

      res <- modules_list[[mod]]

      if (is.null(res)) next

      df <- as.data.frame(res)

      if (nrow(df) == 0) next

      df <- df %>% filter(p.adjust < padj_cutoff)

      if (nrow(df) == 0) next

      # Convert geneID column to readable list
      if ("geneID" %in% colnames(df)) {
        df$geneID <- sapply(strsplit(df$geneID, "/"), paste, collapse = ", ")
      }

      addWorksheet(wb, mod)
      writeData(wb, mod, df)
    }

    # Only save if workbook has sheets
    if (length(wb$worksheets) > 0) {

      file_path <- file.path(outdir,
                             paste0("ORA_", db, "_Results.xlsx"))

      saveWorkbook(wb, file = file_path, overwrite = TRUE)
      cat("Saved:", file_path, "\n")

    } else {
      cat("No significant pathways for", db, "\n")
    }
  }
}

```

```{r}
save_ORA_results(ora_results)
```
#Dotplot
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

plot_ORA_dotplot <- function(ora_object,
                             module_name,
                             database = "GO_BP",
                             top_n = 15,
                             padj_cutoff = 0.05) {

  res <- ora_object[[database]][[module_name]]

  if (is.null(res)) return(NULL)

  df <- as.data.frame(res)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  df <- df %>%
    filter(p.adjust < padj_cutoff) %>%
    arrange(p.adjust) %>%
    head(top_n)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  df$GeneRatioNumeric <- sapply(df$GeneRatio, function(x) {
    eval(parse(text = x))
  })

  df$Description <- str_wrap(df$Description, width = 50)

  p <- ggplot(df,
              aes(x = GeneRatioNumeric,
                  y = reorder(Description, GeneRatioNumeric))) +
    geom_point(aes(size = Count,
                   color = -log10(p.adjust))) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste(database, "Enrichment – Module", module_name),
      x = "Gene Ratio",
      y = NULL,
      color = "-log10(adj.p)",
      size = "Gene Count"
    )

  return(p)
}

```


#Save All Dotplots
```{r}
dir.create(file.path(ora_dir, "plots"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (db in names(ora_results)) {

  for (mod in names(ora_results[[db]])) {

    p <- plot_ORA_dotplot(ora_results,
                          module_name = mod,
                          database = db)

    if (!is.null(p)) {

      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(ora_dir, "plots", paste0(db, "_", mod, "_dotplot.png")),
        plot = p,
        width = 8,
        height = 6,
        dpi = 600
      )
    }
  }
}

```

#Extract Hub Genes per Enriched Pathway
#Recompute kME 
```{r}
datKME <- as.data.frame(cor(expr, MEs, use = "p"))
colnames(datKME) <- paste0("kME_", sub("^ME", "", colnames(MEs)))
rownames(datKME) <- colnames(expr)

```


#Extract Hub Genes for Significant Pathways
```{r}
extract_hub_genes_per_pathway <- function(module_name,
                                          database = "GO_BP",
                                          kME_threshold = 0.7,
                                          padj_cutoff = 0.05) {

  ora_res <- ora_results[[database]][[module_name]]

  if (is.null(ora_res)) return(NULL)

  df <- as.data.frame(ora_res) %>%
    dplyr::filter(p.adjust < padj_cutoff)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  kme_col <- paste0("kME_", module_name)

  module_genes <- feature_map %>%
    dplyr::filter(SOMAmer %in% colnames(expr)[moduleColors == module_name]) %>%
    left_join(
      data.frame(SOMAmer = rownames(datKME),
                 kME = datKME[, kme_col]),
      by = "SOMAmer"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(kME >= kME_threshold)

  pathway_list <- list()

  for (i in 1:nrow(df)) {

    pathway_name <- df$Description[i]

    pathway_genes <- unlist(strsplit(df$geneID[i], "/"))

    hubs <- module_genes %>%
      dplyr::filter(SYMBOL %in% pathway_genes) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(desc(kME))

    if (nrow(hubs) > 0) {

      pathway_list[[pathway_name]] <- hubs %>%
        dplyr::select(SOMAmer, SYMBOL, ENTREZID, kME)
    }
  }

  return(pathway_list)
}

```

#Save hub Genes to Excel
```{r}
library(openxlsx)
library(stringr)

dir.create(file.path(ora_dir, "HubGenes"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Helper: safe unique sheet names
make_unique_sheet_name <- function(base_name, existing_names) {

  base_name <- gsub("[:\\\\/?*\\[\\]]", "", base_name)
  base_name <- substr(base_name, 1, 31)

  if (!(tolower(base_name) %in% tolower(existing_names))) {
    return(base_name)
  }

  i <- 1
  repeat {
    suffix <- paste0("_", i)
    new_name <- substr(base_name, 1, 31 - nchar(suffix))
    new_name <- paste0(new_name, suffix)

    if (!(tolower(new_name) %in% tolower(existing_names))) {
      return(new_name)
    }

    i <- i + 1
  }
}

#------------------------------------------------------------
# Create One Workbook Per Module
#------------------------------------------------------------

for (mod in modules_to_export) {

  cat("Processing module:", mod, "\n")

  hub_data <- extract_hub_genes_per_pathway(
    module_name = mod,
    database = "GO_BP"
  )

  if (is.null(hub_data) || length(hub_data) == 0) {
    cat("No hub genes for", mod, "\n")
    next
  }

  wb <- createWorkbook()

  for (pathway in names(hub_data)) {

    sheet_name <- make_unique_sheet_name(
      pathway,
      names(wb)
    )

    addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)

    writeData(
      wb,
      sheet_name,
      hub_data[[pathway]]
    )
  }

  saveWorkbook(
    wb,
    file = file.path(ora_dir, "HubGenes", paste0("HubGenes_GO_BP_", mod, ".xlsx")),
    overwrite = TRUE
  )
}


```
